channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says Iran will make a deal or be 'decimated'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Trump promised to hold 30,000 migrants at Guantanamo. It's mostly empty.
item.description: A CBS News review of internal government documents and information provided to Congress shows immigration detention facilities at Guantanamo Bay are n...

item.title: Army cuts training as service is short billions of dollars
item.description: The Army is grappling with a sudden budget crunch and scrambling to slash training costs across broad swaths of the force, officials said.

item.title: Jason Collins, NBA's first openly gay player, dies at 47 of brain tumor
item.description: Jason Collins, the NBA’s first openly gay player who went on to become a pioneer for inclusion and an ambassador for the league, has died after an eig...
